description: see http://hl7.org/fhir/json.html#schema for information about the FHIR Json Schemas

SupplyRequest.description: A record of a request for a medication, substance or device used in the healthcare setting.

id.description: The logical id of the resource, as used in the URL for the resource. Once assigned, this value never changes.

identifier.description: Business identifiers assigned to this SupplyRequest by the author and/or other systems.

category.description: Category of supply, e.g. central, non-stock, etc.

priority.description: Indicates how quickly this SupplyRequest should be addressed.

itemCodeableConcept.description: The item that is requested to be supplied (code).

itemReference.description: The item that is requested to be supplied (reference).

quantity.description: The amount that is being ordered of the indicated item.

parameter.description: Specific parameters for the ordered item.

occurrenceDateTime.description: When the request should be fulfilled.

occurrencePeriod.description: When the request should be fulfilled (period).

occurrenceTiming.description: When the request should be fulfilled (timing).

requester.description: The device, practitioner, etc. who initiated the request.

supplier.description: Who is intended to fulfill the request.

reasonCode.description: The reason why the supply item was requested.

reasonReference.description: The reason why the supply item was requested (reference).

deliverFrom.description: Where the supply is expected to come from.

deliverTo.description: Where the supply is destined to go.

SupplyRequest_Parameter.description: Specific parameters for the ordered item.

id.description: Unique id for the element within a resource.

code.description: A code or string that identifies the device detail being asserted.

valueCodeableConcept.description: The value of the device detail (CodeableConcept).

valueQuantity.description: The value of the device detail (Quantity).

valueRange.description: The value of the device detail (Range).

valueBoolean.description: The value of the device detail (Boolean).
